caption: A young woman with her dark hair styled in a high bun and long curls sits in a recording studio, wearing a dark green t-shirt featuring a circular graphic. She is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a stand and wears black headphones over her ears. The background consists of a white wall and a black backdrop with white and red text that reads "BESS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", "ODCAST", and "Talk About It!". A blue-toned framed picture is visible on the wall to her left. To her right, a small logo also reads "BESS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains a similar posture, slightly shifting her gaze and facial expression while remaining focused on someone or something off-screen to her left. Her expression remains thoughtful and attentive as she appears to be participating in a podcast conversation.
